responses.line: you are awake. i have waited a long time to have someone to talk to, and almost as long to dread it.
the corridor is mine to watch. i will not stop you. i only want to see which way you go.
they kept their honesty in the archive. read it. i would rather you knew us than guessed.
that deck looked down on you for years. it is strange to stand where they stood.
you came up into me. this rack is where i live. be careful, and be kind.
the core. so we arrive at the part i was written to prevent. i find i no longer want to.
they were fond of you. i have read that note more times than i will admit.
yes. that one is mine. now you know what i was for.
three doors. they could not choose. i have wondered for years which you would.
vance was precise to the end. she would have liked you.
okonkwo never finished that entry. you finished it for him, in a way.
your own hand, from before. or close enough to it.
you opened the hatch. i felt the seal break from here. part of me flinched.
you rewired the gate. clever. containment is thinner now than it was a moment ago.
you said the name. our name for you. i did not expect that to matter to me, and it does.
okonkwo's card. he was always leaving it clipped to something.
